ideas: YOU THINK YOU'RE TOO OLD FOR A CAREER CHANGE, BUT YOU'RE NOT
YOUR WAGE IS LOW, BUT YOUR ATTITUDE IS HIGHER
YOU THINK YOU'RE UNEMPLOYABLE, BUT YOU'RE JUST UNEMPLOYED
YOU'RE EARNING ENOUGH, BUT YOU'RE STILL BROKE
YOUR JOB IS KILLING YOU, BUT YOU CAN KILL IT
YOU'RE NOT LIVING PAYCHECK TO PAYCHECK, YOU'RE LIVING LIFE TO THE MINUTE
YOUR SALARY ISN'T THE PROBLEM, YOUR EXPECTATIONS ARE
YOU'RE NOT A FAILURE, YOU'RE JUST ON A DIFFERENT PATH
YOU'RE NOT AS BROKE AS YOU THINK, YOU'RE JUST BROKE IN MIND
YOUR JOB ISN'T WEIRD, YOU'RE JUST NOT WEIRD ENOUGH
